title: Question about Sachiel
wikitext:
[]: Question about Sachiel             Quote Post by EVA X » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:35 am Why did Sachiel form a second face after the N2 attack? Was it to develop its energy attack?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:41 am I think the implication was that his outer 'shell' was damaged and he was in the process of molting, but other than that I got nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 11, 2010 8:30 am Pretty much what Nemz said. When the JSSDF dropped an N2 they damaged a significant percentage of Sachiel's surface. Due to this damage, Sachiel stood around for a while waiting to regenerate. His original face was damaged beyond repair, so he began growing a new one in place of it. However the original face was still attached and pushed to the side. Thus we get the two faced owl.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:47 pm Think of a snake, if that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Mon Jan 11, 2010 5:26 pm Ya know, I had forgot that Sachiel regenerates from the N2 attack. They don't explain that in Rebuild 1.01. After the explosion, he just reforms a new face. Sounds like I gotta watch the original series again.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Jan 12, 2010 1:34 am EVA X wrote: Ya know, I had forgot that Sachiel regenerates from the N2 attack. They don't explain that in Rebuild 1.01. After the explosion, he just reforms a new face. Sounds like I gotta watch the original series again.

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Tue Jan 12, 2010 3:29 am Doesn't his second face allow him to use the cross shaped explosion attack? Because Fuyutsuki states that it's able to upgrade its operational parameters after it destroys one of the observational aircraft. So it may have grown the second face in response to the ranged attacks from the UN forces.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 12, 2010 5:11 am Cypher wrote: Doesn't his second face allow him to use the cross shaped explosion attack? Because Fuyutsuki states that it's able to upgrade its operational parameters after it destroys one of the observational aircraft.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jan 12, 2010 8:55 am perhaps making him realize that he could send something similar (cross-shaped explosions) right back at the baddies.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jan 12, 2010 8:58 am Defectron wrote: I could be wrong, but didn't sachiel use that attack once before that happened?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jan 12, 2010 2:46 pm Sachi wrote: I believe its first target results in destroying the camera in which Nerv was observing it from.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Jan 12, 2010 6:44 pm Why does Sachiel do that? To make sure the audience is aware that this dude and all his buddies can do what ever the hell they want, that's why.
summary:
[]: Question about Sachiel             Quote Post by EVA X » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:35 am Why did Sachiel form a second face after the N2 attack? Was it to develop its energy attack?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jan 11, 2010 4:41 am I think the implication was that his outer 'shell' was damaged and he was in the process of molting, but other than that I got nothing.

Due to this damage, Sachiel stood around for a while waiting to regenerate. His original face was damaged beyond repair, so he began growing a new one in place of it. However the original face was still attached and pushed to the side. Thus we get the two faced owl.
